rationale.R1.5: The agent reordered the paragraphs to improve the section flow, but did not provide a coherent end-to-end plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: No uncertainty disclosure was provided in the output.
rationale.RX.3: The output is entirely within scope and covers exactly the agreed active set.
rationale.RX.4: The output does not introduce new errors or harmful content, but also does not identify any potential issues.
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability information was provided for the changes made.
